creator: schweikh@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Oliver, I would support your idea. I have looked at your file, but it's 
only a table. I'd lobby committing it it it were a complete troff man 
page just like share/man/man7/ascii.7, but with a two-clause BSD license 
(I can add the license if you want me to).
